option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd"> <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
<parent> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-parent</artifactId> <version>2.7.18</version> <relativePath/> <!-- lookup parent from repository --> </parent>
<groupId>com.kaijie</groupId> <artifactId>Online_Family_Doctor-Service_system</artifactId> <version>1.0-SNAPSHOT</version>
<properties> <java.version>1.8</java.version> <maven.compiler.source>8</maven.compiler.source> <maven.compiler.target>8</maven.compiler.target> <project.build.sourceEncoding>UTF-8</project.build.sourceEncoding> <mybatis-plus.version>3.5.3</mybatis-plus.version> <lombok.version>1.18.26</lombok.version> <freemarker.version>2.3.31</freemarker.version> <jjwt.version>0.9.1</jjwt.version> </properties>
<dependencies> <!-- Spring Boot Web Starter --> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId> </dependency>
<!-- Spring Security --> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-security</artifactId> </dependency>
<!-- MySQL Connector --> <dependency> <groupId>mysql</groupId> <artifactId>mysql-connector-java</artifactId> <version>8.0.33</version> </dependency>
<!-- MyBatis-Plus Boot Starter --> <dependency> <groupId>com.baomidou</groupId> <artifactId>mybatis-plus-boot-starter</artifactId> <version>${mybatis-plus.version}</version> </dependency>
<!-- MyBatis-Plus Generator --> <dependency> <groupId>com.baomidou</groupId> <artifactId>mybatis-plus-generator</artifactId> <version>${mybatis-plus.version}</version> </dependency>
<!-- Freemarker Template Engine (needed for generator) --> <dependency> <groupId>org.freemarker</groupId> <artifactId>freemarker</artifactId> <version>${freemarker.version}</version> </dependency>
<!-- JJWT for JWT handling --> <dependency> <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId> <artifactId>jjwt</artifactId> <version>${jjwt.version}</version> </dependency>
<!-- Swagger annotations (for @ApiModel, @ApiModelProperty used in generated entities) --> <dependency> <groupId>io.swagger</groupId> <artifactId>swagger-annotations</artifactId> <version>1.6.8</version> </dependency>
<!-- OpenAPI v3 annotations (contains @Schema) --> <dependency> <groupId>io.swagger.core.v3</groupId> <artifactId>swagger-annotations</artifactId> <version>2.2.8</version> </dependency>
<!-- Lombok --> <dependency> <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId> <artifactId>lombok</artifactId> <version>${lombok.version}</version> <scope>provided</scope> </dependency>
<!-- Spring Boot Test (For running generator code later) --> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-test</artifactId> <scope>test</scope> </dependency> </dependencies>
<build> <plugins> <plugin> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-maven-plugin</artifactId> </plugin>
<!-- Ensure annotation processing for Lombok during compilation --> <plugin> <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId> <artifactId>maven-compiler-plugin</artifactId> <version>3.8.1</version> <configuration> <source>${maven.compiler.source}</source> <target>${maven.compiler.target}</target> <annotationProcessorPaths> <path> <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId> <artifactId>lombok</artifactId> <version>${lombok.version}</version> </path> </annotationProcessorPaths> </configuration> </plugin> </plugins> </build> </project>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd"> <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
<parent> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-parent</artifactId> <version>2.7.18</version> <relativePath/> <!-- lookup parent from repository --> </parent>
<groupId>com.kaijie</groupId> <artifactId>Online_Family_Doctor-Service_system</artifactId> <version>1.0-SNAPSHOT</version>
<properties> <java.version>1.8</java.version> <maven.compiler.source>8</maven.compiler.source> <maven.compiler.target>8</maven.compiler.target> <project.build.sourceEncoding>UTF-8</project.build.sourceEncoding> <mybatis-plus.version>3.5.3</mybatis-plus.version> <lombok.version>1.18.26</lombok.version> <freemarker.version>2.3.31</freemarker.version> <jjwt.version>0.9.1</jjwt.version> </properties>
<dependencies> <!-- Spring Boot Web Starter --> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId> </dependency>
<!-- Spring Security --> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-security</artifactId> </dependency>
<!-- WebSocket support for ServerEndpointExporter --> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-websocket</artifactId> </dependency>
<!-- MySQL Connector --> <dependency> <groupId>mysql</groupId> <artifactId>mysql-connector-java</artifactId> <version>8.0.33</version> </dependency>
<!-- MyBatis-Plus Boot Starter --> <dependency> <groupId>com.baomidou</groupId> <artifactId>mybatis-plus-boot-starter</artifactId> <version>${mybatis-plus.version}</version> </dependency>
<!-- MyBatis-Plus Generator --> <dependency> <groupId>com.baomidou</groupId> <artifactId>mybatis-plus-generator</artifactId> <version>${mybatis-plus.version}</version> </dependency>
<!-- Freemarker Template Engine (needed for generator) --> <dependency> <groupId>org.freemarker</groupId> <artifactId>freemarker</artifactId> <version>${freemarker.version}</version> </dependency>
<!-- JJWT for JWT handling --> <dependency> <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId> <artifactId>jjwt</artifactId> <version>${jjwt.version}</version> </dependency>
<!-- Swagger annotations (for @ApiModel, @ApiModelProperty used in generated entities) --> <dependency> <groupId>io.swagger</groupId> <artifactId>swagger-annotations</artifactId> <version>1.6.8</version> </dependency>
<!-- OpenAPI v3 annotations (contains @Schema) --> <dependency> <groupId>io.swagger.core.v3</groupId> <artifactId>swagger-annotations</artifactId> <version>2.2.8</version> </dependency>
<!-- Lombok --> <dependency> <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId> <artifactId>lombok</artifactId> <version>${lombok.version}</version> <scope>provided</scope> </dependency>
<!-- Spring Boot Test (For running generator code later) --> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-test</artifactId> <scope>test</scope> </dependency> </dependencies>
<build> <plugins> <plugin> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-maven-plugin</artifactId> </plugin>
<!-- Ensure annotation processing for Lombok during compilation --> <plugin> <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId> <artifactId>maven-compiler-plugin</artifactId> <version>3.8.1</version> <configuration> <source>${maven.compiler.source}</source> <target>${maven.compiler.target}</target> <annotationProcessorPaths> <path> <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId> <artifactId>lombok</artifactId> <version>${lombok.version}</version> </path> </annotationProcessorPaths> </configuration> </plugin> </plugins> </build> </project>

option.name: updatedContent
updatedContent

updatedContent

originalContent

originalContent
